title: An Act providing an appropriation for the operating expenses of the Virgin Islands Hospital and Health Facilities Corporation from the General Fund of
text:
ACTNG8 892
BILL NO. 35-0344
THIRTY-FIFTH LEGISLATURE OF THE VIRGIN ISLANDS
Regular Session
2024
An Act providing an appropriation for the operating expenses ofthe Virgin Islands Hospital
and Health Facilities Corporation from the General Fund ofthe Treasury ofthe Government of
the Virgin Islands for the fiscal year October 1, 2024, through September 30, 2025
---0---
Be it enactedby the Legislature ofthe Virgin Islands:
SECTION 1. The following sums, or so much thereof as may be necessary, are
appropriated from the General Fund of the Treasury ofthe Government ofthe Virgin Islands
for the operating expenses, including maintenance, supplies and equipment, and other purposes
ofthe Virgin Islands Government Hospitals and Health Facilities Corporation for the fiscal year
October 1, 2024, through September 30, 2025.
0100 GENERAL FUND FY 2025
7110 SCHNEIDER REGIONAL MEDICAL CENTER $29,250,000
SCHNEIDER REGIONAL MEDICAL CENTER UTITLIES $ 3,500,000
-
TOTAL 7110 SCHNEIDER REGIONAL MEDICAL CENTER $32,750,000
7110 JUAN F. LUIS HOSPITAL AND MEDICAL CENTER $27,750,000
JUAN F. LUIS HOSPITAL AND MEDICAL CENTER UTILITES $ 3,500,000
-
TOTAL 7110 JUAN F. LUIS HOSPITAL AND MEDICAL CENTER $31,250,000
TOTAL HOSPITAL AND HEALTH FACILITIES CORPORATION $64,000,000

2
TOTAL 0100 GENERAL FUND $64,000,000
Thus passed by the Legislatthe ofthe Virgin Islands on September 27, 2024.
Witness our Hands and Seal of the Legislature of the Virgin Islands this 30hday of
September, AD., 2024.
Novelle E. Francis, Jr.
President
Secretary
Bill No. 35-0344 is hereby approved.
Witness my hand and the Seal of the Government of
the United States Virgin Islands at Charlotte Amalie,
St. Thomas, This (4- day ofOctober, 2024 A.D.
Governor
